data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding SLA definitions and breach detection.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to SLA breach detection and compensation. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to SLA definitions or breach detection mechanisms. The linked use case mentions the need for SLA definitions but lacks concrete evidence that these have been established or validated in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of SLA definitions (arrival windows, max wait, completion windows) being validated.
No evidence of SLA breach detection mechanisms being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add SLA definitions validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify SLA definitions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add SLA breach detection validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify SLA breach detection.
